product: Genie interface and file upload enhancements
tagline: Fixed off screen color ramp editor in Genie: Resolved a bug where the color ramp editor was hidden off screen.
what_it_does: Fixed off screen color ramp editor in Genie: Resolved a bug where the color ramp editor was hidden off screen. Improved file upload security and setup in Genie: File uploads are now accessible only to the users who uploaded them. Setup is simplified to automatically designate the catalog and schema where the file is stored.
why_it_matters: Improved file upload security and setup in Genie: File uploads are now accessible only to the users who uploaded them.
plain_summary: Fixed off screen color ramp editor in Genie: Resolved a bug where the color ramp editor was hidden off screen. Improved file upload security and setup in Genie: File uploads are now accessible only to the users who uploaded them.

capabilities.desc: Partner-Powered AI features must be enabled. See Partner-powered AI features.
